message:
fix(parser,diff,wasm): subgraph key stability, ANSI-aware diff widths, and API updates

Parser fixes:
- dot_parser: Use a monotonic serial counter for subgraph lookup keys
  instead of source line numbers, which broke when the same cluster
  key appeared at different lines across normalized body iterations.
- mermaid_parser: Add the required lookup_key parameter to all
  ensure_subgraph() call sites (journey, kanban, timeline,
  architecture, block-beta, C4 boundary) to match the updated
  IrBuilder API that distinguishes lookup key from display key.

Diff rendering (fm-render-term):
- display_width() now strips ANSI escape codes before counting
  characters, fixing column-alignment corruption when colorized
  output was measured.
- Add strip_ansi() helper with matching unit test.
- Simplify endpoint_id() to use the new resolve_endpoint_node() +
  node() convenience methods on MermaidDiagramIr, removing the manual
  match on IrEndpoint variants.
- align_changed_block() now emits pure Removed + Added lines instead
  of paired Changed lines, producing cleaner unified-style diffs.
- Remove unused IrNodeId import.

WASM bindings (fm-wasm):
- Reorder imports to satisfy rustfmt (alphabetical within groups).
- Add layout_diagram_traced_with_algorithm_and_guardrails import to
  match upstream fm-layout API additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
